content.body: building a little display to replace the paper calendar in my kitchen and it is truly incredible how easy temporal has made this
Do you mind sharing a bit more what makes you feel that it's easier? How would the alternative be without Temporal?

content.formatted_body:
well i start with this code

  const now = Temporal.Now.zonedDateTimeISO();
  const startOfWeek = now.subtract({ days: now.dayOfWeek - 1 }).startOfDay();
  const endOfWeek = startOfWeek.add({ days: 7 });

content.body: i have no idea what the alternative would be, i'd have to search for a library i guess
also being able to calculate a duration from a calendar event and format it in a human readable way
actually i can just send this i guess https://gist.github.com/devsnek/f8d7c3afb1e76973c4e61628131787c9

bakkot: Thanks so much [tackling promise leaks in v8](https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/v8/v8/+/7646250). This has been plaguing the community (really in all engines I've tested) for so long without them realizing.
content.formatted_body: bakkot: Thanks so much tackling promise leaks in v8. This has been plaguing the community (really in all engines I've tested) for so long without them realizing.

content.body: FWIW, here is a gist for a crude test I wrote 4 years ago to check the behavior of various engines in different scenarios: https://gist.github.com/mhofman/e4031aa4cd2375d0f151f62691724475
